description_long: This is a modern two-seater chaise with a sleek, rectangular silhouette and a sturdy wooden frame. The seat and backrest are upholstered in black faux leather, featuring a grid of deep, square tufting that adds both texture and visual interest. The armrests are gently curved and made of polished wood, matching the legs and frame, which provide a warm contrast to the dark upholstery. The backrest is tall and straight, offering ample support, while the seat is wide and flat, designed for comfort. The legs are straight and robust, ensuring stability and durability. This piece would be well-suited for urban parks, waiting areas, or stylish public spaces.
description: A modern black faux leather chaise with deep square tufting, a polished wooden frame, and gently curved armrests. The design is sleek and supportive, ideal for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the chaise, the tufted seat and backrest, and both wooden armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the curve of the armrest, and the straight backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, uninterrupted backrest and the wooden frame's rear legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other armrest and the chaise's overall slim profile.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall, straight, and fully upholstered in black faux leather with a grid of deep square tufting, giving it a modern and structured appearance. It is continuous across the width of the chaise and lacks any visible cutouts or decorative elements beyond the tufting.
attribute_armrest_presence: The chaise has armrests on both sides, made of polished wood with a gentle outward curve, attached to the frame at seat level.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, sturdy, and constructed from polished wood, matching the armrests and frame. They are simple in design with no visible decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is black faux leather with a prominent grid of square tufting, creating a geometric, quilted pattern across both the seat and backrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: The chaise features a single, continuous seat cushion and a single, continuous backrest cushion, both attached and integrated into the frame. There are no loose or additional cushions visible.
